posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community Seniors,

We are a Design Company and having a plethora of task requests from client. We are keen to use Monday.com Form as the route of new article requirement. For user friendly, we are wondering if the file can be dragged into the form instead of “attachment”

Best regards
Struggling Newbie

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kuo,

with monday forms this is not possible jet. But in general it is’nt impossible, if you would create with your own website and the api of monday an form, it would work, may by this is a little over the top, its on you. ^^

~ Silas

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
